_comment: Claude Projects whose conversations should NEVER be indexed into Carol's memory. Carol is the CCF estimating assistant — personal/unrelated Claude projects (Cable Venture, Migra Bot, parenting, sports, etc.) just pollute her recall. Match is case-insensitive substring on the Claude Project name.
_to_add_more: Append to either list above and Carol's next cowork sync (every 30-60 min) will skip them. No restart needed.
